name: Shecky Greene
bio: Shecky Greene, born Fred Sheldon Greenfield, was an American comedian regarded as one of the great Las Vegas nightclub headliners of the 1950s and 1960s, famed for his manic, largely improvised stage act. A frequent guest on The Ed Sullivan Show and The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson, he was admired by peers as a brilliant ad-libber who could sustain an audience for hours.

timeline.ev: Opened in Las Vegas at the Last Frontier
Began a five-year headlining run at the Tropicana
Died in Las Vegas at age 97

accolades: Longtime Las Vegas headliner and showroom draw
Made 63 appearances on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson

specials.t: Shecky Greene at the Las Vegas Riviera
